features: Out-of-this-World Fragrance: Enjoy the celestial fusion of space candy and creamy coconut, a fragrance that could transport you to the stars
Gently Cleanses: This shower gel leaves skin feeling soft, smooth, and revitalized after each use.
Cruelty-free and Vegan: Cussons Creations is committed to sustainability A compassionate choice for conscious consumers
For the whole family: Our body wash is formulated to be suitable for all the family, ensuring a delightful and refreshing shower every time
Artfully Crafted Design: Our packaging is 100 Percent recyclable, with eye-catching designs that also add some fun to your bathroom
description: Product Description Experience a shower out of this world with  Limited Edition Cussons Creations To The Moon And Back. A fragrance blend of Space Candy and Coconut, suitable for all skin types and the whole family. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Polyquaternium-7, PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, PEG-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Parfum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Sodium Chloride, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, C11-15 Pareth-7, C11-15 Pareth-40, Linalool. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. See more
